title: Glow-C Vitamin Serum
description: Lightweight vitamin C serum for dullness and everyday glow.
recommendationText: Best for dull skin, morning routines and beginner glow care.

title: Barrier Repair Moisturizer
description: Ceramide-rich moisturizer for dry, sensitive and compromised skin barriers.
recommendationText: Best for dry skin, sensitive skin and barrier repair.

title: Daily Sunscreen Gel
description: Light gel sunscreen for daily SPF protection without a sticky finish.
recommendationText: Best for daily SPF, oily skin and outdoor use.
